- Top-right red cross: ids 3, 5, 7, 8 at (9, 52), (10, 51), (10, 53), (11, 52) - 4 separate 1-pixel objects
- Bottom-left red cross: ids 24, 25, 27, 28 at (51, 10), (52, 9), (52, 11), (53, 10) - 4 separate 1-pixel objects
- Red dots inside source objects: id=4 at (10, 31) and id=17 at (28, 10) - 1-pixel objects each
So each red cross has 4 red pixels, not 5. The center is black (part of the background).
Now, I've been trying to solve this level for 46 actions. Let me think about what I haven't tried:
1. Clicking on the red cross pixels (ids 3, 5, 7, 8, 24, 25, 27, 28) - I think I tried clicking on the red crosses before, but maybe not on the exact pixels.
2. Clicking on the red dots inside the source objects (ids 4, 17) - I think I tried this before.
3. Clicking on the gray bars (ids 1, 15) - I think I tried this before.
4. Clicking on the divider lines (ids 11, 21) - I think I tried this before.
5. Clicking on the U-shapes (ids 10, 12, 19, 20) - I've tried this many times.
6. Clicking on the dark gray inner regions (ids 13, 14) - I've tried this many times.
7. Clicking on the container borders (ids 9, 18) - I tried this recently.
8. Clicking inside the containers - I just tried this.
9. Clicking on the background - I think I tried this before.
Wait, I just realized something. I've been clicking on objects, but I haven't tried clicking on the BLACK CENTER of the red crosses. The top-right red cross has a black center at (10, 52), and the bottom-left red cross has a black center at (52, 10). Let me try clicking on these black centers.
Actually, I think I already tried clicking on the black centers before (ids 6 and 26), and nothing happened. But let me try again with the exact coordinates.
Actually, let me try a completely different approach. What if the goal is to click on the RED CROSS PIXELS? Let me try clicking on all 4 red pixels of one cross.

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the red cross pixels
# Top-right red cross: (9, 52), (10, 51), (10, 53), (11, 52)

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 10}   # top pixel of bottom-left cross
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
